text: Experienced an issue with the note editor preview where it incorrectly switches to another cloze when I have non-consecutive cloze ord numbers. This was particularly noticeable when I edited the note to refresh the preview.

Oh, AnkiDroid, you've outdone yourself again! Can't wait to see the new audio recorder view, waveform audio player, and decoupled logic - all in one beautifully confusing interface. This app just keeps getting better and better!

Switched to another flashcard app due to constant spam notifications in the logs during sync process. It's really distracting and ruins the study experience compared to my previous app, which was much smoother.

I've been using AnkiDroid for studying, but recently, some of my flashcards aren't showing up. It seems like there's a problem with the app and I'm having trouble figuring out what's causing it. Hopefully, the developers can fix this soon.
Unfortunately, my deck keeps crashing while reordering columns.
Dear developers, sometimes when I try delete a note, the app crash. It says about database problem. Could you please fix this issue? Thanks.

Experiencing issues with the new study screen on AnkiDroid v2.24.0alpha10. The whiteboard eraser seems to struggle with swift strokes, leaving unwanted residue behind. Please look into this as it affects productivity during my study sessions.

Finding AnkiDroid extremely helpful for my studies, but the 'Toggle Whiteboard' feature consistently fails, especially with swipe right and three finger touch gestures. Please, developers, fix this urgent issue so I can effectively use this amazing app.

Love using AnkiDroid for studying! But sometimes, there's an issue when adding temp files during testing. I think developers should consider improving this part for better performance in multi-module support.

Title: Long overdue upgrade for AnkiDroid

I've been using AnkiDroid for years now, and I'm absolutely in love with it. However, I recently ran into a problem while trying to create new decks - the app kept crashing whenever I tried to do so, and it was incredibly frustrating. I suspect this might be related to the 'extract module: `:compat`' issue mentioned in one of your posts. I understand this is a complex technical matter, but if possible, please fix this in the next update. It would mean the world to me to be able to continue using my beloved app without any interruptions! Thanks!

AnkiDroid has been an essential tool for my studies, but lately I've encountered an issue with the ProfileMetadata class that's causing it to malfunction repeatedly. I hope the developers can address this problem soon as I desperately need this app to work smoothly again.

Title: Filtered Deck Screen Issues

Review: "Recently updated AnkiDroid and found a few inconsistencies in the new filtered deck screen. For instance, the screen title matches the name box, there seems to be a theme issue with the blue loading bar, and the number input boxes don't limit the number of digits or require input. Also, the dropdown selection feels unintuitive. Hoping these will be addressed soon.
Loving AnkiDroid app, but sometimes struggle to understand how to use field filters effectively. Wish there was a clearer explanation or tutorial on applying multiple filters together.
Jagged lines in the drawing feature make it difficult to study effectively.

I absolutely love using AnkiDroid for my studies, but I've been encountering a persistent issue with the app's layout lately. It seems like some parts aren't displaying correctly due to a naming convention problem. Please, dear developers, could you speed up the process of fixing this? It would greatly improve my study experience and help me retain information more effectively.
Default note settings don't always save changes properly.

Ah, AnkiDroid, where dreams of efficient learning meet the cold reality of a stuttering app that collapses at the mere sight of 60,000 cards. Seems it can't handle such numerical prowess without taking a nap. Perhaps I should stick to card games after all.
Nice app, but confirmation prompt before removing background could be clearer.

Title: Issue with Answer Actions in App

I love using AnkiDroid, but I recently ran into some trouble. Sometimes when I try to change an answer action, a prompt doesn't come up asking if I want to reveal the answer, and other times I get a confusing warning message. It seems like the app gets mixed up when I try to assign gestures or keys to certain actions, especially when those actions are already set. It would be great if these issues could be fixed so I can study more efficiently!

Title: Frustrating video playback issue with AnkiDroid app

Description: Recently, I've been experiencing a troublesome problem while using the AnkiDroid app on my Google Pixel 4a 5G. When I enable the card zoom in accessibility settings to 200% and try to view a card containing a video clip, the video appears but the play button becomes unresponsive. Instead of the intended video playback, all I see is a grey box with a circling animation. It would be wonderful if the developers could address this issue in the upcoming updates so I can effectively utilize the videos as study material. Thank you!
